problem.title: Final Problem 4
problem.description: This is the fourth of the final problems to reach our target of 251 problems.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Binary Search [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: This solution applies binary search on a sorted array to find a target value in O(log n) time. It maintains left and right boundaries and repeatedly halves the search space by comparing the midpoint element to the target. The key insight is that comparing mid to target tells us which half cannot contain the answer, allowing us to discard it immediately.
